TT?T. 1fW>3r, ITJ*7 22I')GI/20I6 i n -- 1 of 2 -- THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)| \T3pJZ T T ^ T rRT, 100, irf^Tfrfw, ^Rff - 400 002 pn-.^t. 1/15/2016-it snf] MINISTRY OF CORPORATE AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 4th May, 2016 S.O. 1634(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (I) of section 10B of the Chartered Accountants Act, 1949 (38 of 1949) and in pursuance of rule 3 of the Chartered Accountants (Election Tribunal) Rules, 2006 the Central Government hereby establishes a Tribunal consisting of the following persons to decide disputes arising under section I0A of the Act in the matter of election to the Council of the Institute of Chartered Accountants of India held in December, 2015, namely:- (i) Shri Ramayan Yadav, Presiding Officer Joint Secretary and Legal Adviser, Ministry of Law and Justice, Department of Legal Affairs, Shastri Bhawan, New Delhi-110001. (ii) Shri Alok Samantarai, Member Director of Inspection and Investigation, Ministry of Corporate Affairs, Shastri Bhawan, New Delhi-II0001. (iii) Shri K.L. Kamboj, Member Regional Director (Western Region), Ministry of Corporate Affairs, Everest 5* Floor, 100 Marine Drive, Mumbai- 400 002. 2. This notification shall come into force from the date of its publication in the Official Gazette. [F.No. 1/15/2016-PI1 K.V.R. MURTY, Jt. Secy. -- 2 of 2 --
